description: Live GitHub + WakaTime activity over the last 7 days.

data.summary: This week, Ethan Qiu logged 23 hrs 48 mins of coding time, with a daily average of 3 hrs 13 mins. His tracked work spanned 6 projects, and his most-used languages were Java (38%), Other (32%), Markdown (16%), and TypeScript (5%). There were no GitHub commits, pull requests, or new repositories recorded this week.
